ddls:
CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the position the player plays */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the team the player belongs to */,
  "jersey_number" INTEGER /* Jersey number of the player */,
  "height" TEXT /* Height of the player */,
  "weight" TEXT /* Weight of the player */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "experience_years" INTEGER /* Number of years of experience of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_position_id FOREIGN KEY ("position_id") REFERENCES positions ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the team */,
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the division the team belongs to */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the team belongs to */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins by the team */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses by the team */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties by the team */,
  "points" INTEGER /* Number of points earned by the team */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_division_id FOREIGN KEY ("division_id") REFERENCES divisions ("division_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_conference_id FOREIGN KEY ("conference_id") REFERENCES conferences ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_statistics" (
  "game_stat_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the player */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "toi" INTEGER /* Time on ice during the game */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "wins" INTEGER /* Number of wins */,
  "losses" INTEGER /* Number of losses */,
  "ties" INTEGER /* Number of ties */,
  "ga" INTEGER /* Goals against */,
  "so" INTEGER /* Number of shutouts */,
  "gaa" REAL /* Goals against average */,
  "shots_blocked" INTEGER /* Number of shots blocked by the player */,
  "penalty_minutes" INTEGER /* Number of penalty minutes for the player */,
  "plus_minus" INTEGER /* Plus/minus rating of the player */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_stat_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "games" (
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game */,
  "home_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the home team */,
  "away_team_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the away team */,
  "game_date" TEXT /* Date when the game was played */,
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the venue where the game was played */,
  "game_duration" TEXT /* Duration of the game */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of attendees at the game */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_venue_id FOREIGN KEY ("venue_id") REFERENCES venues ("venue_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_home_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("home_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_games_away_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("away_team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "positions" (
  "position_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each position */,
  "position_name" TEXT /* Name of the position */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the position */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("position_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "conferences" (
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each conference */,
  "conference_name" TEXT /* Name of the conference */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the conference */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conference_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "divisions" (
  "division_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each division */,
  "division_name" TEXT /* Name of the division */,
  "conference_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the conference the division belongs to */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the division */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("division_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "venues" (
  "venue_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each venue */,
  "venue_name" TEXT /* Name of the venue */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the venue */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Seating capacity of the venue */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the venue */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("venue_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_roles" (
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each role */,
  "role_name" TEXT /* Name of the role */,
  "permissions" TEXT /* Permissions associated with the role */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_accounts" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "role_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the role of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_accounts_role_id FOREIGN KEY ("role_id") REFERENCES user_roles ("role_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "game_plans" (
  "game_plan_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each game plan */,
  "game_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the game */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the coach who made the plan */,
  "plan_description" TEXT /* Description of the game plan */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("game_plan_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plans_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES user_accounts ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_game_plans_game_id FOREIGN KEY ("game_id") REFERENCES games ("game_id")
)
